settings.title: Settings
settings.launchOnStartupDesc: Start the companion app when Windows boots
settings.openDashboardDesc: Show this window when the app starts
settings.alwaysAdminDesc: Required for overlays on games running as admin
settings.closeAction.askDesc: Show a dialog asking what to do when you close a window.
settings.closeAction.minimizeDesc: Hide the window and keep the app running in the background.
settings.closeAction.exitDesc: Quit the entire app when you close a window.
settings.languageDesc: Changes the language for the companion app interface
settings.infoNote: Game-specific auto-run settings can be configured on each game's page in the sidebar. App settings like hotkeys can be configured in the overlay or desktop windows.
settings.gpu.defaultDesc: Full GPU acceleration. Best performance for interactive maps.
settings.gpu.disableVideoDesc: Only disables DirectComposition for video content. Try this first if you experience screen flickering.
settings.gpu.disableCompositingDesc: Disables GPU-based compositing. May help with multi-monitor flickering issues.
settings.gpu.softwareDesc: Completely disables GPU. Slowest option, use only as a last resort.
settings.gpuWarning: Non-default GPU settings may reduce map performance. Only use if experiencing display issues.
home.discordJoin: Join the {{discord}} to share your own suggestions!
game.overlayHint: Start the game to enable the overlay. Desktop mode is always available.
game.webOnlyHint: This game only has web-based maps available. Companion app support with overlays and position tracking is not available yet.
game.autoRunDesc: Automatically launch companion when game starts
game.noSessions: No sessions recorded yet. Start the game to see session activity.
elevation.title: Administrator Required
elevation.subtitle: For overlay on {{gameName}}
elevation.description: This game is running with elevated privileges. Windows security prevents the overlay from displaying above it without matching permissions.
elevation.hint: Restarting as administrator will allow the overlay to work properly.
